TeresaSweeney

Author, and host of Rewritten. Speaking and writing for ambitious working women who love their careers, love their families, and are done believing they have to choose between the two.

Subscribe Listen to Rewritten
McKinsey→ Private equity→ GLG→ Blackstone→ Head of Investment Intelligence, a NY investment firm
Meet Teresa

Author, Wall Street Executive, Podcast Host, and Mother of Two.

Seventeen years in finance — McKinsey, private equity (first female VP at twenty-eight), GLG, Blackstone, and now Head of Investment Intelligence at a New York investment firm. My whole career has been spent in the rooms where the decisions get made, usually the only woman in them. I still write — about the gap between the life that looks right on paper and the one that actually feels like yours.

Rewritten

My Podcast

Real conversations for ambitious women rewriting what work, marriage, and motherhood are supposed to look like. New episodes out now.

On Your Terms

My Newsletter · on Substack

Longer-form writing, straight to your inbox. The one asset no algorithm controls — and where the news lands first.

The Book

Coming soon

A new book is on the way. The title's still under wraps. Get on the list to hear it the day it's announced.

Writing for ambitious women done living someone else's script.

There's no one "all." It's for you to define for yourself. Everything here — my podcast, my writing, my book on the way — is about taking the wheel and deciding, deliberately, what kind of life you want to drive toward.

What I write about
Where it begins

The Wake-Up

The moment you realize you've been winning at a game you didn't choose. Stories from the rooms, and the day I walked away from the dream job.

The honest part

The Reckoning

What you accept becomes the life you live. The standards reframe — at work, at home, and inside your own head.

The daily work

The Practice

Living on your terms isn't one bold decision. It's the small, daily choices that move you toward who you want to be.

My Book — coming soon

My new book is on the way. The title's still under wraps.

Seventeen years inside the rooms, one finished manuscript, and a single idea I kept circling back to: you can stop living by someone else's definition of success and start writing your own.

  • Define what you actually want — not what you were told to.
  • Build the standards that hold the line when you're tired.
  • The systems behind the 5pm leave and the real marriage.
  • One framework — applied to career, self, partnership, and parenting.
Be first to know Title and date announced to the list first.
The Podcast

Rewritten

Co-hosted with my longtime friend Jess, Rewritten is for ambitious women in demanding careers grappling with the gap between the life that looks right on paper and the one that actually feels like theirs. Real conversations for women rewriting what it means to be a mom, a wife, and a boss.

For working mothers who love their careers, love their families, and are done believing they have to choose between the two.

Apple Podcasts Spotify

On LinkedIn

My writing, three times a week.

The stories, the reframes, and the moments that didn't make the book. It's where the audience is built — one honest post at a time.

Follow on LinkedIn
Core beliefs
01There's no one "all." You define it for yourself.
02Your life is shaped less by what you want than by what you accept.
03The standards you tolerate become the life you live.
04Discomfort is a compass, not a warning.
05You don't need the whole story — just the next line.
06A career and a life are one system, not two.
On Your Terms · My Newsletter

Build a life on your terms.

Followers are rented. A list is owned. On Your Terms is my newsletter — long-form writing in your inbox, and the first word when the book is announced, before it's anywhere else.

Free. Read past issues anytime. Unsubscribe whenever you like.
